# WordPress 4.9.2 Security and Maintenance Release – WordPress News

[WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/)

[News](https://wordpress.org/news)

WordPress 4.9.2 Security and Maintenance Release

All posts

Search results

* * *

WordPress 4.9.2 is now available. This is a **security and maintenance release** for all versions since WordPress 3.7﻿. We strongly encourage you to update your sites immediately.

An XSS vulnerability was discovered in the Flash fallback files in MediaElement, a library that is included with WordPress. Because the Flash files are no longer needed for most use cases, they have been removed from WordPress.

MediaElement has released a new version that contains a fix for the bug, and [a WordPress plugin containing the fixed files](https://wordpress.org/plugins/mediaelement-flash-fallbacks/)
 is available in the plugin repository.

Thank you to the reporters of this issue for practicing [responsible security disclosure](https://make.wordpress.org/core/handbook/testing/reporting-security-vulnerabilities/)
: [Enguerran Gillier](https://opnsec.com/)
 and [Widiz](https://widiz.com/)
﻿.

21 other bugs were fixed in WordPress 4.9.2. Particularly of note were:

*   JavaScript errors that prevented saving posts in Firefox have been fixed.
*   The previous taxonomy-agnostic behavior of `get_category_link()` and `category_description()` was restored.
*   Switching themes will now attempt to restore previous widget assignments, even when there are no sidebars to map.  
    

The Codex has [more information about all of the issues fixed in 4.9.2](https://codex.wordpress.org/Version_4.9.2)
, if you'd like to learn more.

﻿[](https://wordpress.org/download/)
[Download WordPress 4.9.2](https://wordpress.org/download/)
 or venture over to Dashboard → Updates and click "Update Now." Sites that support automatic background updates are already beginning to update automatically.

Thank you to everyone who contributed to WordPress 4.9.2:

[0x6f0](https://profiles.wordpress.org/0x6f0/)
, [Aaron Jorbin](https://profiles.wordpress.org/jorbin/)
, [Andrea Fercia](https://profiles.wordpress.org/afercia/)
, [Andrew Duthie](https://profiles.wordpress.org/aduth/)
, [Andrew Ozz](https://profiles.wordpress.org/azaozz/)
, [Blobfolio](https://profiles.wordpress.org/blobfolio/)
, [Boone Gorges](https://profiles.wordpress.org/boonebgorges/)
, [Caleb Burks](https://profiles.wordpress.org/icaleb/)
, [Carolina Nymark](https://profiles.wordpress.org/poena/)
, [chasewg](https://profiles.wordpress.org/chasewg/)
, [Chetan Prajapati](https://profiles.wordpress.org/chetan200891/)
, [Dion Hulse](https://profiles.wordpress.org/dd32/)
, [Hardik Amipara](https://profiles.wordpress.org/hardik-amipara/)
, [ionvv](https://profiles.wordpress.org/ionvv/)
, [Jason Caldwell](https://profiles.wordpress.org/jaswrks/)
, [Jeffrey Paul](https://profiles.wordpress.org/jbpaul17/)
, [Jeremy Felt](https://profiles.wordpress.org/jeremyfelt/)
, [Joe McGill](https://profiles.wordpress.org/joemcgill/)
, [johnschulz](https://profiles.wordpress.org/johnschulz/)
, [Juhi Patel](https://profiles.wordpress.org/juiiee8487/)
, [Konstantin Obenland](https://profiles.wordpress.org/obenland/)
, [Mark Jaquith](https://profiles.wordpress.org/markjaquith/)
, [Nilambar Sharma](https://profiles.wordpress.org/rabmalin/)
, [Peter Wilson](https://profiles.wordpress.org/peterwilsoncc/)
, [Rachel Baker](https://profiles.wordpress.org/rachelbaker/)
, [Rinku Y](https://profiles.wordpress.org/rinkuyadav999/)
, [Sergey Biryukov](https://profiles.wordpress.org/sergeybiryukov/)
, and [Weston Ruter](https://profiles.wordpress.org/westonruter/)
.﻿

# WordPress 4.9.5 Security and Maintenance Release – WordPress News

[WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/)

[News](https://wordpress.org/news)

WordPress 4.9.5 Security and Maintenance Release

All posts

Search results

* * *

WordPress 4.9.5 is now available. This is a **security and maintenance release** for all versions since WordPress 3.7. We strongly encourage you to update your sites immediately.

WordPress versions 4.9.4 and earlier are affected by three security issues. As part of the core team's ongoing commitment to security hardening, the following fixes have been implemented in 4.9.5:

1.  Don't treat `localhost` as same host by default.
2.  Use safe redirects when redirecting the login page if SSL is forced.
3.  Make sure the version string is correctly escaped for use in generator tags.

Thank you to the reporters of these issues for practicing ﻿[coordinated security disclosure](https://make.wordpress.org/core/handbook/testing/reporting-security-vulnerabilities/)
: [xknown](https://profiles.wordpress.org/xknown/)
 of the WordPress Security Team, [Nitin Venkatesh (nitstorm)](https://hackerone.com/nitstorm)
, and [Garth Mortensen](https://twitter.com/voldemortensen)
 of the WordPress Security Team.

Twenty-five other bugs were fixed in WordPress 4.9.5. Particularly of note were:

*   The previous styles on caption shortcodes have been restored.
*   Cropping on touch screen devices is now supported.
*   A variety of strings such as error messages have been updated for better clarity.
*   The position of an attachment placeholder during uploads has been fixed.
*   Custom nonce functionality in the REST API JavaScript client has been made consistent throughout the code base.
*   Improved compatibility with PHP 7.2.

[This post has more information about all of the issues fixed in 4.9.5 if you'd like to learn more](https://make.wordpress.org/core/2018/04/03/wordpress-4-9-5/)
.

[Download WordPress 4.9.5](https://wordpress.org/download/)
 or venture over to Dashboard → Updates and click "Update Now." Sites that support automatic background updates are already beginning to update automatically.

Thank you to everyone who contributed to WordPress 4.9.5:

[1265578519](https://profiles.wordpress.org/1265578519-1/)
, [Aaron Jorbin](https://profiles.wordpress.org/jorbin/)
, [Adam Silverstein](https://profiles.wordpress.org/adamsilverstein/)
, [Alain Schlesser](https://profiles.wordpress.org/schlessera/)

# Error establishing a database connection when I try to install wordpress | WordPress.org

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#content)

[WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#main)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)
 / [Installing WordPress](https://wordpress.org/support/forum/installation/)
 / Error establishing a database connection when I try to install wordpress

Search for:  Search forums

*   [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/437d0602b745079a37f3cf178931864ceb588e529ec78de969253926cdba969f?s=200&d=retro&r=g)maxwello62](https://wordpress.org/support/users/maxwello62/ "View maxwello62's profile")
    
    (@maxwello62)
    
      
    
    [6 months, 3 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/ "April 29, 2025 at 9:37 am")
    
    Hello  
    I have a compute engine on GCP with httpd 2.4 and php 8.0.30  
    On the same GCP project, I created a db mysql 8.0.40.  
      
    And when I want install wordpress, I fill out the forms with dbname, username, host,…  
    But after I have an error: Error establishing a database connection.  
      
    I try to connect with client mysql from my compute engine and the connection is successfull.  
      
    I have no logs!
    
    Could you help me?
    
    Thanks
    

Viewing 9 replies - 1 through 9 (of 9 total)

*   Moderator [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/2ac5ccc9fb9799f9c6bf98c8ae287073dce99121c32f954c8112e9835601997a?s=200&d=retro&r=g)threadi](https://wordpress.org/support/users/threadi/ "View threadi's profile")
    
    (@threadi)
    
    [6 months, 3 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18441264 "April 29, 2025 at 10:37 am")
    
    I don’t know what GCP is, but maybe the MySQL service is running on a different port there. Check the details you have for the connection again – including the host and the port.
    
    Thread Starter [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/437d0602b745079a37f3cf178931864ceb588e529ec78de969253926cdba969f?s=200&d=retro&r=g)maxwello62](https://wordpress.org/support/users/maxwello62/ "View maxwello62's profile")
    
    (@maxwello62)
    
    [6 months, 3 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18441380 "April 29, 2025 at 11:37 am")
    
    Hello  
    The port is 3306, defaut port
    
    [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d22d7f40f8c031b40638348af57207d946a73e8d54409196707ac83023ffb526?s=200&d=retro&r=g)bratgeneratorz](https://wordpress.org/support/users/bratgeneratorz/ "View bratgeneratorz's profile")
    
    (@bratgeneratorz)
    
    [6 months, 2 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18449272 "May 4, 2025 at 7:33 pm")
    
    I think their is mysql databse problems
    
    Thread Starter [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/437d0602b745079a37f3cf178931864ceb588e529ec78de969253926cdba969f?s=200&d=retro&r=g)maxwello62](https://wordpress.org/support/users/maxwello62/ "View maxwello62's profile")
    
    (@maxwello62)
    
    [6 months, 2 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18449825 "May 5, 2025 at 7:35 am")
    
    Hello eveyrobdy
    
    First of all, thank you for your help.  
    I enable debug mode and I have this error:
    
    **Warning**: mysqli\_real\_connect(): (HY000/2002): Permission denied in **/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-includes/class-wpdb.php** on line **1988**
    
    `Permission denied`
    
    I have checked all permissions!  
    And from my vm, I success to connect to the managed mysql db:  
      
    
    \[root@vm\]# mysql -h 10.198.46.64 -u wordpressuser2 -p  
    Enter password:  
    Welcome to the MySQL monitor. Commands end with ; or \\g.  
    Your MySQL connection id is 119798  
    Server version: 8.0.40-google (Google)
    
    mysql>
    
    Thread Starter [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/437d0602b745079a37f3cf178931864ceb588e529ec78de969253926cdba969f?s=200&d=retro&r=g)maxwello62](https://wordpress.org/support/users/maxwello62/ "View maxwello62's profile")
    
    (@maxwello62)
    
    [6 months, 2 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18449842 "May 5, 2025 at 7:42 am")
    
    here is the line 1988 of class-wpdb.php :  
    if ( WP\_DEBUG ) {  
    mysqli\_real\_connect( $this->dbh, $host, $this->dbuser, $this->dbpassword, null, $port, $socket, $client\_flags );
    
    Thread Starter [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/437d0602b745079a37f3cf178931864ceb588e529ec78de969253926cdba969f?s=200&d=retro&r=g)maxwello62](https://wordpress.org/support/users/maxwello62/ "View maxwello62's profile")
    
    (@maxwello62)
    
    [6 months, 2 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18449938 "May 5, 2025 at 8:20 am")
    
    Oh it works!  
    When I execute this command: setsebool -P httpd\_can\_network\_connect 1  
      
    Thank you very much
    
    [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/c37bc8b748963a33b591da3c86c77df75cc06f2dfc9751ce69e492200c8965df?s=200&d=retro&r=g)Mahmoud Agwa](https://wordpress.org/support/users/mahmoudagwa901/ "View Mahmoud Agwa's profile")
    
    (@mahmoudagwa901)
    
    [6 months, 2 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18449976 "May 5, 2025 at 8:38 am")
    
    [@maxwello62](https://wordpress.org/support/users/maxwello62/)
    
    > The issue is resolved.  
    > It was caused by SELinux blocking Apache from connecting to external databases.  
    > The fix was to run:
    > 
    >     setsebool -P httpd_can_network_connect 1
    >     
    > 
    > Hopefully this helps anyone who runs into the same issue.  
    > Let me know if you need any further assistance
    
    Moderator [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d9136a5e215cbde25b406d72274102503f930eab99cfc97031ef213a8ef95848?s=200&d=retro&r=g)Support Moderator](https://wordpress.org/support/users/moderator/ "View Support Moderator's profile")
    
    (@moderator)
    
    [6 months, 2 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18450195 "May 5, 2025 at 10:34 am")
    
    [@mahmoudagwa901](https://wordpress.org/support/users/mahmoudagwa901/)
     _Please stop using ChatGPT or a similar tool to generate replies._ That is not welcome as it is better for forum volunteers such as yourself to use real replies in their own words.
    
    [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/c6839c404fe649dfc5b60ac0cb59c05296ded9bacfca6220846daa1c82377f91?s=200&d=retro&r=g)Syed Shaan Haider](https://wordpress.org/support/users/syedshaan/ "View Syed Shaan Haider's profile")
    
    (@syedshaan)
    
    [6 months, 2 weeks ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/error-establishing-a-database-connection-when-i-try-to-install-wordpress/#post-18458940 "May 9, 2025 at 6:34 pm")
    
    Hi,  
    Add this to your wp\_config.php to see what’s going wrong:
    
    define( ‘WP\_DEBUG’, true );  
    define( ‘WP\_DEBUG\_LOG’, true );  
    define( ‘WP\_DEBUG\_DISPLAY’, false );
    

Viewing 9 replies - 1 through 9 (of 9 total)

The topic ‘Error establishing a database connection when I try to install wordpress’ is closed to new replies.

 / Daily blog

Search for:  Search forums

*   Resolved [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/6db129ae36997271ad0b1a99c40b80fce97aba18e5551108ae18ddac6d1e58c4?s=200&d=retro&r=g)moretus](https://wordpress.org/support/users/moretus/ "View moretus's profile")
    
    (@moretus)
    
      
    
    [2 years, 5 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/daily-blog/ "June 20, 2023 at 7:44 pm")
    
    Hello, I am creating a blog with Elementor Pro and the Hello theme. For this I have created a homepage with a header and a footer.  
    Between header and footer I have a row with two columns, with fixed text on the right side, in the left column there will be a daily post.
    
    How can I write a daily post in the left part and the previous post will end up in the archive. I have tried with sections, single post, single page, but I can’t figure it out.
    
    Many thanks for a solution, kind regards due to Moretus.
    
    The page I need help with: _\[[log in](https://login.wordpress.org/?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwordpress.org%2Fsupport%2Ftopic%2Fdaily-blog%2F&locale=en_US)\
     to see the link\]_

    Hi [@moretus](https://wordpress.org/support/users/moretus/)
     – this forum is for folks using the Twenty Eleven theme. I’d suggest getting support via the Elementor Pro folks directly.

# Unknown

\=== Plugin Name === Contributors: (this should be a list of wordpress.org userid's) Donate link: https://example.com/ Tags: tag1, tag2 Requires at least: 4.7 Tested up to: 5.4 Stable tag: 4.3 Requires PHP: 7.0 License: GPLv2 or later License URI: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html Here is a short description of the plugin. This should be no more than 150 characters. No markup here. == Description == This is the long description. No limit, and you can use Markdown (as well as in the following sections). For backwards compatibility, if this section is missing, the full length of the short description will be used, and Markdown parsed. A few notes about the sections above: \* "Contributors" is a comma separated list of wordpress.org usernames \* "Tags" is a comma separated list of tags that apply to the plugin \* "Requires at least" is the lowest version that the plugin will work on \* "Tested up to" is the highest version that you've \*successfully used to test the plugin\* \* Stable tag must indicate the Subversion "tag" of the latest stable version Note that the \`readme.txt\` value of stable tag is the one that is the defining one for the plugin. If the \`/trunk/readme.txt\` file says that the stable tag is \`4.3\`, then it is \`/tags/4.3/readme.txt\` that'll be used for displaying information about the plugin. If you develop in trunk, you can update the trunk \`readme.txt\` to reflect changes in your in-development version, without having that information incorrectly disclosed about the current stable version that lacks those changes -- as long as the trunk's \`readme.txt\` points to the correct stable tag. If no stable tag is provided, your users may not get the correct version of your code. == Frequently Asked Questions == = A question that someone might have = An answer to that question. = What about foo bar? = Answer to foo bar dilemma. == Screenshots == 1. This screen shot description corresponds to screenshot-1.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif). Screenshots are stored in the /assets directory. 2. This is the second screen shot == Changelog == = 1.0 = \* A change since the previous version. \* Another change. = 0.5 = \* List versions from most recent at top to oldest at bottom. == Upgrade Notice == = 1.0 = Upgrade notices describe the reason a user should upgrade. No more than 300 characters. = 0.5 = This version fixes a security related bug. Upgrade immediately. == A brief Markdown Example == Markdown is what the parser uses to process much of the readme file. \[markdown syntax\]: https://daringfireball.net/projects/markdown/syntax Ordered list: 1. Some feature 1. Another feature 1. Something else about the plugin Unordered list: \* something \* something else \* third thing Links require brackets and parenthesis: Here's a link to \[WordPress\](https://wordpress.org/ "Your favorite software") and one to \[Markdown's Syntax Documentation\]\[markdown syntax\]. Link titles are optional, naturally. Blockquotes are email style: > Asterisks for \*emphasis\*. Double it up for \*\*strong\*\*. And Backticks for code: \`\`

# Theme: Twenty Eleven; displaying the sidebar on smaller screens | WordPress.org

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/theme-twenty-eleven-displaying-the-sidebar-on-smaller-screens/#content)

[WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/theme-twenty-eleven-displaying-the-sidebar-on-smaller-screens/#main)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)
 / [Themes and Templates](https://wordpress.org/support/forum/themes-and-templates/)
 / Theme: Twenty Eleven; displaying the sidebar on smaller screens

Search for:  Search forums

*   [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/6a774b4c94c12585d2c6a64c4b45687a1df7e55b792969d4fcfb53fd5d0f140c?s=200&d=retro&r=g)pwilsonofc](https://wordpress.org/support/users/pwilsonofc/ "View pwilsonofc's profile")
    
    (@pwilsonofc)
    
      
    
    [11 years, 10 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/theme-twenty-eleven-displaying-the-sidebar-on-smaller-screens/ "January 7, 2014 at 3:40 pm")
    
    I have been looking at the various (closed) discussions on how to ensure that a Twenty Eleven sidebar always gets displayed even on smaller screens such as ipads and iphones. Without that sidebar present people new to my site will miss the point completely. All the advice seems to involve complex changes to CSS style sheets. I have tried the simplest advice (to comment out the line “<meta name=”viewport” content=”width=device-width” />” but that doesn’t seem to work for me (and I’m not even sure it was a good idea doing that).
    
    What’s the latest position on this? Can anyone provide a clear simple fix for this? Does the latest version of Twenty Eleven (1.7) fix the problem (I am using 1.2)? Can anyone advise me of another similar theme to use which will display sidebars on all screens?  
    Paul
    

Viewing 2 replies - 1 through 2 (of 2 total)

*   [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/5e52265402626dacf1e982ee9b7c2f0c7cbfc58f6fe8620d44cbb842cd83ddc6?s=200&d=retro&r=g)esmi](https://wordpress.org/support/users/esmi/ "View esmi's profile")
    
    (@esmi)
    
    [11 years, 10 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/theme-twenty-eleven-displaying-the-sidebar-on-smaller-screens/#post-4478785 "January 7, 2014 at 3:43 pm")
    
    Have a look at [http://wordpress.org/extend/plugins/twenty-eleven-theme-extensions/](http://wordpress.org/extend/plugins/twenty-eleven-theme-extensions/)
    
    Thread Starter [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/6a774b4c94c12585d2c6a64c4b45687a1df7e55b792969d4fcfb53fd5d0f140c?s=200&d=retro&r=g)pwilsonofc](https://wordpress.org/support/users/pwilsonofc/ "View pwilsonofc's profile")
    
    (@pwilsonofc)
    
    [11 years, 10 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/theme-twenty-eleven-displaying-the-sidebar-on-smaller-screens/#post-4478814 "January 7, 2014 at 4:43 pm")
    
    I did look at that (and have looked again) – but it doesn’t seem to address the problem I want to overcome – am I wrong?
    

Viewing 2 replies - 1 through 2 (of 2 total)

The topic ‘Theme: Twenty Eleven; displaying the sidebar on smaller screens’ is closed to new replies.

# Why is New Page misbehaving, missing Page Attributes | WordPress.org

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/why-is-new-page-misbehaving-missing-page-attributes/#content)

[WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/why-is-new-page-misbehaving-missing-page-attributes/#main)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)
 / [Fixing WordPress](https://wordpress.org/support/forum/how-to-and-troubleshooting/)
 / Why is New Page misbehaving, missing Page Attributes

Search for:  Search forums

*   [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/a0f9b97e5a648339f991581ebef6c8ea8086b7d0ebc3f5b3e02336e92bd091a1?s=200&d=retro&r=g)markhdavid](https://wordpress.org/support/users/markhdavid/ "View markhdavid's profile")
    
    (@markhdavid)
    
      
    
    [3 years, 1 month ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/why-is-new-page-misbehaving-missing-page-attributes/ "October 2, 2022 at 7:18 pm")
    
    Hi, I’m using WordPress 6.0.2 with theme Twenty Nineteen, version 2.3. I’m just trying to create a home page. There are two attributes missing. If I do
    
    > Dashboard > Pages > Add New
    
    then on the right side I see `Page Attributes`, and under it is just the  
    `Order` attribute with default value 0. Per the doc
    
    > [https://wordpress.org/support/article/pages-add-new-screen/](https://wordpress.org/support/article/pages-add-new-screen/)
    
    there should also be `Parent` and `Template`. Why are they missing? What can I do about it?
    

Viewing 3 replies - 1 through 3 (of 3 total)

*   Moderator [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d1900f2adcdf1910bcaad713bdba5d308f16efb7919671ed46a69b2d6cad0833?s=200&d=retro&r=g)t-p](https://wordpress.org/support/users/t-p/ "View t-p's profile")
    
    (@t-p)
    
    [3 years, 1 month ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/why-is-new-page-misbehaving-missing-page-attributes/#post-16062958 "October 2, 2022 at 8:38 pm")
    
    I recommend asking at [https://wordpress.org/support/theme/twentynineteen#new-post](https://wordpress.org/support/theme/twentynineteen#new-post)
     so its developers and support community can help you with this.
    
    Thread Starter [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/a0f9b97e5a648339f991581ebef6c8ea8086b7d0ebc3f5b3e02336e92bd091a1?s=200&d=retro&r=g)markhdavid](https://wordpress.org/support/users/markhdavid/ "View markhdavid's profile")
    
    (@markhdavid)
    
    [3 years, 1 month ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/why-is-new-page-misbehaving-missing-page-attributes/#post-16063066 "October 2, 2022 at 10:00 pm")
    
    [@t-p](https://wordpress.org/support/users/t-p/)
     why, is there some reason to think it has to do with the theme? I’d like to know, since I’m learning WordPress.
    
    Moderator [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d1900f2adcdf1910bcaad713bdba5d308f16efb7919671ed46a69b2d6cad0833?s=200&d=retro&r=g)t-p](https://wordpress.org/support/users/t-p/ "View t-p's profile")
    
    (@t-p)
    
    [3 years, 1 month ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/why-is-new-page-misbehaving-missing-page-attributes/#post-16063113 "October 2, 2022 at 10:38 pm")
    
    Different themes have different settings and do things slightly differently. So, as I suggested, try asking at your theme’s dedicated support.
    

Viewing 3 replies - 1 through 3 (of 3 total)

The topic ‘Why is New Page misbehaving, missing Page Attributes’ is closed to new replies.

# Mine Educn | WordPress Theme | WordPress.org

[WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/)

[Themes](https://wordpress.org/themes)

All themes

Mine Educn

Mine Educn
==========

![mine27 Avatar](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/b5a463372f9786ca3bd100bd05a2c7542c9f55104a94ccb26c0219956b8a7168?s=48&d=mm&r=g)

[mine27](https://wordpress.org/themes/author/995525477-1/)

![](https://i0.wp.com/themes.svn.wordpress.org/mine-educn/1.0.4/screenshot.png?w=post-thumbnail&strip=all)

[Preview](https://wordpress.org/themes/mine-educn/preview/)

[Download](https://downloads.wordpress.org/theme/mine-educn.1.0.4.zip)

*   Version 1.0.4
*   Last updated November 16, 2025
*   Active installations Less than 10
*   WordPress version 6.8
*   PHP version 7.4

Stylish, modern FSE education theme

Features
--------

[Block editor patterns](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/block-patterns/)
, [Block editor styles](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/block-styles/)
, [Blog](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/blog/)
, [Custom colors](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/custom-colors/)
, [Custom logo](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/custom-logo/)
, [Custom menu](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/custom-menu/)
, [Editor style](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/editor-style/)
, [Featured images](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/featured-images/)
, [Block themes](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/full-site-editing/)
, [News](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/news/)
, [One column](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/one-column/)
, [RTL language support](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/rtl-language-support/)
, [Sticky post](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/sticky-post/)
, [Style variations](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/style-variations/)
, [Threaded comments](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/threaded-comments/)
, [Translation ready](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/translation-ready/)
, [Wide blocks](https://wordpress.org/themes/tags/wide-blocks/)

Patterns
--------

*   
*   
*   
*   
*   
*   
*   
*   
*   
*

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/many-options-in-the-free-plan-good-support/#content)

[WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/many-options-in-the-free-plan-good-support/#main)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)
 / Plugin: [WordPress Slider Block Gutenslider](https://wordpress.org/support/plugin/gutenslider/reviews)
 / Feauture rich in the free plan; great support.

Search for:  Search forums

*   [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/8c680d2df937e981d01e195d175374a6268181587655048bf4fc5d5a86d8c5c7?s=200&d=retro&r=g)rod](https://wordpress.org/support/users/nomadarod/ "View rod's profile")
    
    (@nomadarod)
    
      
    
    [4 years, 6 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/many-options-in-the-free-plan-good-support/ "May 24, 2021 at 10:10 am")
    
    Thank you for providing a plugin that offers so many options in the free plan. It’s quite enough for what I need, and I couldn’t afford to buy the premium since I’m in the beginning of my freelance project.
    
    Thanks for the support. It’s assuring to know it will be there.
    
    *   This topic was modified 3 years, 6 months ago by [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/8c680d2df937e981d01e195d175374a6268181587655048bf4fc5d5a86d8c5c7?s=28&d=retro&r=g)rod](https://wordpress.org/support/users/nomadarod/ "View rod's profile")
        .

*   Resolved [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d930bd5bdb69922b0343d5430dac09a437b44b9a88f82e2fe52abcb51e7b7f96?s=200&d=retro&r=g)me1298](https://wordpress.org/support/users/me1298/ "View me1298's profile")
    
    (@me1298)
    
      
    
    [1 month ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/how-to-get-menu-bar/ "October 15, 2025 at 10:03 pm")
    
    Hello 🙂 Sorry to bother and if this was asked before I am sorry.  
    But how do I get that top menu bar? it’s not displaying. 🙁
    
    I mean “home” “forum” “contact”etc.
    
    I’m sorry I’m kind of a noob.
    
    The page I need help with: _\[[log in](https://login.wordpress.org/?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwordpress.org%2Fsupport%2Ftopic%2Fhow-to-get-menu-bar%2F&locale=en_US)\
     to see the link\]_
    

Viewing 4 replies - 1 through 4 (of 4 total)

*   [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/5ad9fb96fe03e3dd5307953be3ef6b84800c89912f3a0659b6ba597da470fba8?s=200&d=retro&r=g)r1k0](https://wordpress.org/support/users/r1k0/ "View r1k0's profile")
    
    (@r1k0)
    
    [1 month ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/how-to-get-menu-bar/#post-18682938 "October 15, 2025 at 11:53 pm")
    
    Hey [@me1298](https://wordpress.org/support/users/me1298/)
    ,
    
    You’re no bother at all. We are always to help.
    
    To enable the header navigation menu, follow these steps:
    
    *   From your admin dashboard, navigate to **Appearance > Customize > Menus**.
    *   Click the navigation menu if you have one already.  
        If you don’t have one, you can click the **Create New Menu** button to create a new navigation menu. On the next page, enter the name of the menu and check the primary and mobile navigation check boxes under Menu location. Click next, then the **Add Items** button to add links (pages, posts, etc) in your menu. Click the **publish** button to display changes.
    *   On the next page, check the primary and mobile navigation check boxes under Menu location.
    *   Click the **publish** button to display changes.
    
    Hope this helps, let me know how is goes. Feel free to ask any more questions you might have.
    
    Best of luck.
    
    *   This reply was modified 1 month ago by [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/5ad9fb96fe03e3dd5307953be3ef6b84800c89912f3a0659b6ba597da470fba8?s=28&d=retro&r=g)r1k0](https://wordpress.org/support/users/r1k0/ "View r1k0's profile")
        .
    
    Thread Starter [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d930bd5bdb69922b0343d5430dac09a437b44b9a88f82e2fe52abcb51e7b7f96?s=200&d=retro&r=g)me1298](https://wordpress.org/support/users/me1298/ "View me1298's profile")
    
    (@me1298)
    
    [1 month ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/how-to-get-menu-bar/#post-18683459 "October 16, 2025 at 10:01 am")
    
    Hey [@r1k0](https://wordpress.org/support/users/r1k0/)
    
    Thank you so much 😀 I have the menu now.  
    it’s much appriciated.
    
    Cheers,  
    Marco
    
    [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/cff71670de1da22495337fe886bee84183574fe61dd13eb8e071c63fc01c4604?s=200&d=retro&r=g)michael-levelup](https://wordpress.org/support/users/michaeltarongoy/ "View michael-levelup's profile")

    Hi there,
    
    Glad to hear that.
    
    Can we ask a favor? If this is already sorted out for you, please set this topic to resolved.
    
    If you have further questions or need additional assistance, feel free to start a new topic or refer to our Kadence Help Center here: [https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center)

# Free version 5* Support 5* Misses Mailerlite integration :( - [Forminator Forms – Contact Form, Payment Form & Custom Form Builder] Review | WordPress.org

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/free-version-5-support-5-misses-mailerlite-integration/#content)

[WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)

[Skip to content](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/free-version-5-support-5-misses-mailerlite-integration/#main)

[Forums](https://wordpress.org/support/forums/)
 / Plugin: [Forminator Forms – Contact Form, Payment Form & Custom Form Builder](https://wordpress.org/support/plugin/forminator/reviews)
 / Free version 5\* Support 5\* Misses Mailerlite integration :(

Search for:  Search forums

*   [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/8c680d2df937e981d01e195d175374a6268181587655048bf4fc5d5a86d8c5c7?s=200&d=retro&r=g)rod](https://wordpress.org/support/users/nomadarod/ "View rod's profile")
    
    (@nomadarod)
    
      
    
    [3 years, 7 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/free-version-5-support-5-misses-mailerlite-integration/ "April 11, 2022 at 10:19 am")
    
    Misses Mailchimp integration. I’m still waiting 🙁 Otherwise, it is a pretty decent plugin on its free version. Thank you for the opportunity. I couldn’t do it otherwise since I am just starting my business and can’t pay for it… just yet 😉  
    Great support also! Thank you for being there!
    
    *   This topic was modified 3 years ago by [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/8c680d2df937e981d01e195d175374a6268181587655048bf4fc5d5a86d8c5c7?s=28&d=retro&r=g)rod](https://wordpress.org/support/users/nomadarod/ "View rod's profile")
        .
    

Viewing 3 replies - 1 through 3 (of 3 total)

*   [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/4c78ffa84e5c4bc8212bb91b777cb1009dc5966eb897cb2b91f4539c9c6da4cd?s=200&d=retro&r=g)Dave – WPMU DEV Support](https://wordpress.org/support/users/wpmudevsupport18/ "View Dave – WPMU DEV Support's profile")
    
    (@wpmudevsupport18)
    
    [3 years, 7 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/free-version-5-support-5-misses-mailerlite-integration/#post-15546999 "April 11, 2022 at 10:47 am")
    
    Hey [@nomadarod](https://wordpress.org/support/users/nomadarod/)
    
    Thanks a lot for the review and rating! We really appreciate this 🙂
    
    I see you mentioned Mailchimp in your review there, Forminator does have an [integration](https://wpmudev.com/docs/wpmu-dev-plugins/forminator/#mailchimp)
     with that, but an integration with Mailerlite is indeed still in progress.
    
    I’ve passed your review to the devs as another Mailerlite integration request.
    
    You may want to consider using Zapier as a workaround in the meantime: [https://wpmudev.com/blog/zapier-wordpress-form-integrations/](https://wpmudev.com/blog/zapier-wordpress-form-integrations/)
    
    Zapier can collect data and send it to Mailerlite.
    
    Regards,  
    Dave
    
    Thread Starter [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/8c680d2df937e981d01e195d175374a6268181587655048bf4fc5d5a86d8c5c7?s=200&d=retro&r=g)rod](https://wordpress.org/support/users/nomadarod/ "View rod's profile")
    
    (@nomadarod)
    
    [3 years, 7 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/free-version-5-support-5-misses-mailerlite-integration/#post-15547384 "April 11, 2022 at 12:20 pm")
    
    Hi Dave,  
    Thanks.
    
    Sorry for the confusion. Mailerlite I meant indeed.
    
    Zappier doesn’t seem to offer that service for free, unfortunately.
    
    Plugin Support [![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/39d54f8ccc0ad0e49da8d9d75e88d1f780bfffcc24c862e65f42ba2a5ea5e38e?s=200&d=retro&r=g)Laura – WPMU DEV Support](https://wordpress.org/support/users/wpmudev-support8/ "View Laura – WPMU DEV Support's profile")
    
    (@wpmudev-support8)
    
    [3 years, 7 months ago](https://wordpress.org/support/topic/free-version-5-support-5-misses-mailerlite-integration/#post-15548027 "April 11, 2022 at 3:09 pm")
    
    Hi [@nomadarod](https://wordpress.org/support/users/nomadarod/)
    
    Thanks for response!
    
    As my colleague mentioned, Mailerlite integration is planned for future and we are also planning to add a “generic webook” integraiton to make it possible to use webhooks other than just Zapier.
    
    I don’t have an ETA but it’s going to be there in future.
    
    Best regards,  
    Adam
    

Viewing 3 replies - 1 through 3 (of 3 total)

The topic ‘Free version 5\* Support 5\* Misses Mailerlite integration :(’ is closed to new replies.
